ab: musa su inu?
ch: A:你要去哪裡?
en: A: Where are you going?

ab: musa kung muhi tabihi’ i ra’iri’.
ch: B:我要去菜園裡種菜。
en: B: I’m going to plant vegetables in the garden.

ab: nanu niya su i tawawun?
ch: A:你在做什麼?
en: A: What are you doing?

ab: payux sa’ayun ka’amam la, niyan kung i samriyat ka’amam, kisa laga pasiyan mu siya’ la.
ch: B:草太多了，我在砍草，等一下要澆水。
en: B:There's too much grass, I'm cutting it, I'll have to water it later.

ab: ragiy kung tikay magan su sawki ru karuh aw?
ch: A:幫我把鐮刀和鋤頭拿來好嗎?
en: A: Will you get my scythes and hoes, please?

ab: niyan su siyun inu pi?
ch: B:你放在哪裡呢?
en: B: Where did you put it?

ab: ki mu siyun i bih na Kawin.
ch: A:放在犁耙旁邊。
en: A: Put it next to the plow rake.

ab: tanabun su ku uraw la?
ch: A:你翻過土了嗎?
en: A: Did you turn over the soil?

ab: nisan mu i tanabun, pagahap kung kisa la.
ch: B:我剛翻過土，等等要播種。
en: B: I just turned over the soil, and so on to sow seeds.

ab: ba’un kamiyut ku panuhiy su na tabihi’ la?
ch: A:你種的菜可以收成了嗎?
en: A: Are your vegetables ready to be harvested?

ab: musa ba’un kamiyut ku tamana hani hiya la,sina ti ki hasa hiya ga ayat ba’un kamiyut na.
ch: B:這裡的高麗菜可以收成了，那裡的昭和草就還不能收成。
en: B: The cabbage here is ready to be harvested, but the Showa grass there is not yet ready to be harvested.

ab: waw! tiya kinpayux kanuwih su na ngahi’.
ch: A:哇!你挖了這麼多的地瓜。
en: A: (sighs) Wow! You dug up so many gourds.

ab: ragiy kung pinta’ i kahu aw?
ch: B:幫我放穀倉好嗎?
en: B: Will you help me with the barn?

ab: nanu ku ki mamu kabalayun?
ch: A:你們在做什麼?
en: A: What are you doing?

ab: niya sami pawsa ttara’ su siyux.
ch: B:我們在放漁網抓魚。
en: B: We're releasing fishing nets to catch fish.

ab: payux ku siyux runi aw?
ch: A:這裡的魚多嗎?
en: A: Are there many fish here?

ab: payux siyu laku niyan i pusung hani la.
ch: B:魚簍裡已經抓了很多魚。
en: B: The fish basket has been full of fish.

ab: mutu su maha nanu kamayap su siyux karariyax?
ch: A:你平常怎麼抓魚?
en: A: How do you usually catch fish?

ab: mutu mu sabing su tawnux samabu su siyux.
ch: B:我都用魚叉射魚。
en: B: I shoot fish with a spear.

ab: mutu su sabing bahawni musa i maliyap aw?
ch: A:你會用弓箭打獵嗎?
en: A: Do you know how to hunt with a bow and arrow?

ab: mutu kung pawsa su ta’uya’ tiri’ mu sinu, karuma’ ga mutu kung maras su patus ru huzin musa maliyap.
ch: B:我通常都是用陷阱抓獵物，偶爾也會拿槍帶狗狩獵。
en: B: I usually catch my prey with a trap, but occasionally I hunt with a gun and a dog.

ab: tu’iy hani ga anwahan na waywak nahi.
ch: A:這是山豬所走的路。
en: A: This is the road the boar took.

ab: uwa su ka ba’un pi?
ch: B:你怎麼知道呢?
en: B: How do you know?

ab: hani ga pilung kuzih na waywak nahi’, misa su tu’i hakayan na waywak nahi’ ku hani.
ch: A:這是山豬的腳印，所以這是山豬所走的路。
en: A: These are the footprints of the boar, so this is the path the boar took.

ab: tanahaw ta musa matayux ku ta’uya ta ,asi ga niyan tari’un su asinu la.
ch: A:快去看我們的陷阱，好像抓到獵物了。
en: A: Go and see our trap, for it seems that we have caught our prey.

ab: huwa su ba’un pi?
ch: B:你怎麼知道呢?
en: B: How do you know?

ab: asi ga wayan sawkan na huzin ku bawyas niya la .hazi ta musa gamalu kiya.
ch: A:狗好像聞到味道了。我們快跟過去。
en: A: The dog seems to have smelled it. Let's follow them.

ab: nanu ku niya su sakalayi su yuwaw hani?
ch: A:你正在製作的是什麼東西?
en: A: What are you working on?

ab: hani ga ta’uya na marahan, mutu i tm’atum su awlit.
ch: B:這是石壓式陷阱，用來抓老鼠的。
en: B: This is a stone trap, used to catch rats.

ab: nanu ku niyan su sakuwan sa yuwaw ti hasa hiya?
ch: A:你放在那裡的是什麼東西?
en: A: What is that thing you put there?

ab: hasa ga ta’uya na tiri su kuzih, mutu miyan tiri su para.
ch: B:那是套腳式繩索陷阱，我們用它來抓山羌。
en: B: It was a leg-rigged rope trap, and we used it to catch Shankiang.

ab: mahuway ku liyutux binkis ka mayi su awyat, kiyan ku bani’an ta niya asinu su sawni.
ch: A:感謝祖靈賜福，今天我們有很多獵物收獲。
en: A: Thanks to the blessing of our ancestors, we had a great harvest today.

ab: hu’ bayay la, rasaw ta inbalayi amalu’ alang ta la ki!
ch: B:是啊!我們帶回部落好好分享吧!
en: B: Yeah! Let's take it back to the tribe and share it!

ab: hu balay la, rasaw ta inbalayi amasu i alang ta ki!
ch: B:是啊!我們帶回部落好好分享吧!
en: B: Yeah! Let's take it back to the tribe and share it!
